recipes.name: Replicated audit log
recipes.trustStatement: First-party Yano recipe using only built-in packaged runtime capabilities.
recipes.description: A replicated append-only log for opaque application records.
recipes.primaryOutcome: One opaque record is threshold-finalized in the shared application order.

recipes.name: Owned registry
recipes.trustStatement: First-party Yano recipe using the bundled standard-library registry.
recipes.description: A first-writer-owned key/value registry with committed query proofs.
recipes.primaryOutcome: The first writer owns a named value that is readable with a committed state proof.
recipes.verificationQuery: proof/{hex(key)} decodes to owner and value

recipes.name: Threshold approval workflow
recipes.trustStatement: First-party Yano recipe using the bundled generic approval state machine.
recipes.description: Validator members propose, approve, reject, and prove terminal decisions.
recipes.primaryOutcome: Distinct validator-member decisions produce a provable terminal approval or rejection.
recipes.verificationQuery: proof/{hex(i/itemId)} decodes to the decision trail

recipes.name: Governed role approvals
recipes.trustStatement: First-party generic role product; applications retain responsibility for acting on an approved payload hash.
recipes.description: Governed organizations, actors, and policies approve arbitrary application payload hashes.
recipes.primaryOutcome: A governed role policy accepts valid actor decisions and rejects an ineligible actor decision.
recipes.firstCommand: apply the generated role bootstrap plan, then submit a signed proposal
recipes.verificationQuery: plugin role-workflow proposals/{id} plus returned proof key

recipes.name: Role-aware evidence ledger
recipes.trustStatement: First-party preview evidence profile; it records and authorizes evidence claims but does not prove real-world truth or external publication by itself.
recipes.description: A role-aware evidence ledger that emits publication intents; add and provision explicit connector capabilities for external mutation.
recipes.primaryOutcome: A role-authorized evidence record and its release decision are committed and queryable.
recipes.firstCommand: apply the generated role bootstrap plan, then submit evidence and a signed release proposal

recipes.name: Custom state-machine project
recipes.trustStatement: Advanced JVM-only path; the operator owns plugin implementation, code review, metadata trust, compatibility, and distribution.
recipes.description: A generated project boundary for a separately reviewed custom state-machine plugin.
recipes.primaryOutcome: The operator-defined state-machine contract is loaded from a reviewed pinned plugin bundle.
recipes.firstCommand: install the reviewed bundle and submit its documented command
recipes.verificationQuery: plugin-defined committed query or state proof
